theorem sum_lim (f : ℕ → PowerSeries K) [TopologicalSpace (PowerSeries K)] [ContinuousAdd (PowerSeries K)] (h : Summable f) : HasSum f (∑' n, f n) :=
  h.hasSum
notes: Replaced the invalid binder annotation [TopologicalAddCommMonoid (PowerSeries K)] with the explicit class arguments [TopologicalSpace (PowerSeries K)] and [ContinuousAdd (PowerSeries K)] required by Summable/HasSum.
Assumes these instances are available; no additional topology is defined in the given context.
